play_circle Start Presentation

Google × Wix Headless

Itay Shmool, Wix.com

USER PERSONA

Elias, Wildlife Photographer

Elias captures the raw majesty of nature — from the piercing gaze of a mountain eagle to the silent stride of a lion across the Serengeti.

The Business Goal

Sell museum-quality fine art prints ranging from $550 to $1,200 per piece.

format_quote

"I am a photographer with a vision, not a developer."

photo_camera WILDLIFE payments PREMIUM brush CREATIVE
auto_awesome Step 1 — Vibe Design

Elias opens Google Stitch

He describes 'Dark, cinematic, gallery-first'. Stitch generates a cohesive, high-fidelity design system and layout in seconds.

This is vibe design.
format_quote
'Elias has a beautiful design. But he can't sell a single print. No cart. No checkout. No inventory. No payments. No blog. No hosting.'
block NO CART
block NO CHECKOUT
block NO PAYMENTS

A design is a picture of a business — not a business.

THE CRITICAL GAP
“

AI tools can plan, design, and code. What they're missing is a real business layer — where commerce, payments, inventory, and compliance actually run.

warning The missing piece in the automation loop.

Wix Business OS

The business layer that turns Elias's design into a real, operating store.
